summary: Iteration 106: Tested Work Readiness Engine (Gate 2) - backend API and frontend WorkReadinessPanel. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend correctly displays WorkReadinessPanel for approved employees with progress bar, blockers list, and View All Blockers dialog. Panel correctly hidden for applicants.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_work_readiness_engine.py - New test file for work readiness engine
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Readiness Engine (Gate 2) fully functional. Backend endpoint: GET /api/employees/{id}/work-readiness-check returns evaluation with can_work, blockers, warnings, verified_count, required_count, role, stage_identity, readiness_status. HCA requires 9 items (contract_acceptance, handbook_acknowledgement, induction, staff_health_questionnaire, care_certificate, right_to_work, dbs, identity, training). Nurse requires 10 items (9 HCA + nmc_registration). Blockers have categories: agreement, form, competency, document, training, expired_document. Frontend WorkReadinessPanel shows for approved employees only (recruitment_approved=true), displays progress bar, blocker list with labels and reasons, and View All Blockers button opens dialog grouped by category.

backend_response_structure.details: Response includes can_work, blockers, warnings, verified_count, required_count, role, stage_identity, readiness_status

backend_hca_9_requirements.details: Healthcare Assistant role correctly has 9 required items: contract_acceptance, handbook_acknowledgement, induction, staff_health_questionnaire, care_certificate, right_to_work, dbs, identity, training

backend_nurse_10_requirements.details: Nurse role correctly has 10 required items (9 HCA + nmc_registration)

backend_blocker_categories.details: Blockers have valid categories: agreement, form, competency, document, training, expired_document

backend_stage_identity.details: stage_identity correctly returns 'employee' for approved, 'applicant' for non-approved

backend_progress_tracking.details: verified_count and required_count are integers, verified_count <= required_count

backend_can_work_logic.details: can_work=False when blockers exist, can_work=True when no blockers

frontend_panel_displays_for_approved.details: WorkReadinessPanel displays for approved employees with recruitment_approved=true

frontend_progress_bar.details: Shows verified_count / required_count with percentage (e.g., '3 / 9 requirements', '33% complete')

frontend_blocker_list.details: Shows blocking items with label and reason (e.g., 'Employment Contract - Employment Contract not completed')

frontend_view_blockers_button.details: View All Blockers button opens dialog with full blocker list

frontend_blockers_dialog.details: Work Readiness Blockers dialog shows blockers grouped by category (Agreements, Forms) with Close button

console_errors_noted: 404 error on employment mismatch fetch (unrelated to work readiness engine)
